title: Knight Helm applies Hit and AL plus two while equipped

plan.title: Knight Helm applies Hit and AL plus two while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Knight Helm to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify AL gains +2, and run a battle to verify Hit gains +2.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Hit bonus comes only from Knight Helm.

steps: Player 1 plays Knight Helm and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm both bonuses apply only while Knight Helm remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective stat output for AL and battle output for Hit.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Knight Helm Hit/AL equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
